content:
As the title suggests currently starting Chapter 6 I feel like my roster is good thus far but I havent really rolled on Chaos or Ultra too too much yet. Is it recommended to roll a few over on those banners before committing to the Blade of Titans? I've linked my current roster for reference

Side note this has been the most welcoming community I've ever seen so thank you in advance for all your help
I feel like she so easy to counter, do i need a sub dps and who i should used? I enjoy her simple playstyle but can't climb more than 1400
so this is my roster rn, i want to advance story or should i look to get more characters?

Hello there.

Both ! 😄
Progressing through the story will get you ressources to invest in your team.

Also, the first few chapters are easy enough that you can stroll through even if your linup is not top-notch.
Did you claim the giftcodes and check Cheri's handbood ?

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Still, pulling a few more awakeners wouldn't hurt. You could start with a full chaos team for now ( i.e. Tawil-Ramona-Doll-Lotan ) but you might want to try every one of the 4 realms as you will eventually need 5 working teams anyways.

Also, don't be too shy about lvling up your team.
You can go to lvl 40 without spending too much mats and lvl 60 for your favorites ones.
I play r1999 and decided to try morimens cuz I love the artstyle, I'd love some help on who I should get and which teams to build. Also some tips for new players are greatly appreciated

Hello there : )

Did you check Cheri's guide ? It's pretry helpful

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431
Also, Ærica can give you some knowledge with /<command>

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Saya and Thaïs work great together but need some trial and error to find out how to actually manage them. Tulu would be a great addition and Aurita will be thrilled to have another shuffle mate in Saya.
Aurita you will get for free as you progress through the game.

As for who to pull ... Cheri's handbook includes a tier list for dps and supports.
But in the end, you'll have to try them out ( recod button, last row ) to decide which you want most.

On piece of advice though : do dwelve in all 4 realms 'cause you will eventually want 5 working teams.

Finally : if you're bummed Sonetto is not that viable on the hardest r99 stages, here Ramona remains OK-ish all the way.

Sorry <@304652156286533642>, will read all this in a bit. Got some responsibilities to attend to first. I went to sleep when you send the message. I will be sending a response to this after reading it.

I so thank you for the effort, it must've been a lot of typing T_T but really, I do appreciate every bit of it.

Ahah, no biggie 😄
I was merely signaling the end of the info drop ^^

I'll let you read through it at your leasure, feel free to ping me anytime.

Welcome aboard ~
